response:
Hello Team,  

Thank you for your time during the session. During the session, we successfully rolled back the change that was performed earlier that day, when the issue was occurring. Testing was carried out and it was confirmed that the GP connection(s) are functioning as expected. In addition to the rollback, the team also implemented configuration changes on the PA-5450s DG and RNs. These changes were verified to be successful and operating as intended.
